annotations.comment: Should this be a discriminated union instead of a plain string union?
validateAnnotation doesn't check for empty `id` — the truthiness check passes for any non-empty string but doesn't validate format.
This line is intentionally long for scroll testing. Consider breaking it up.
Large config object — consider extracting into a separate config module with schema validation.

replies.comment: Agreed, will extract in a follow-up PR.
